response.overview: Lina, the wife of a successful businessman. Her hobby is shopping, shopping and shopping. One day she is shocked by the arrival of a loan shark who comes to seize all her luxury items on the grounds that her husband is in debt. Afiq, a nerdy but brilliant boy who was involved in cryptocurrency, has just returned to Malaysia. Lina and Afiq are shocked to discover that the house deed is now in both their names.
response.title: Jangan Masuk Rumahku
